rationale.fidelity: Faithfully preserves the pre-window integer roster, coverage, stochastic arrivals and service times, queue outcomes, and expected labor-plus-waiting-cost objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the recurring advance decision, wage-versus-delay stake, congestion mechanism, and modeled roster comparison clear.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed; broader contribution is not asserted.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Uses only what the supplied log records and explicitly rejects implemented causal savings and generalization beyond observed windows.
rationale.prose_clarity: Economical, direct, and understandable to a managerial reader.
rationale.overall: A near-ideal evidence-bounded framing with exact decision fidelity and no hard failure.
